name: art.arteditor.gami-prefab-importer
description: Convert button images from ArtEditor.art into Unity UI Prefabs with 9-slice sprites, Button components, and TextMeshPro labels. 100% free. No account required. No network calls. Drag-and-drop ready for any Canvas.

samples.description: Sample scene with pre-generated button prefabs showing 9-slice setup and TextMeshPro integration.
